title: Ender Padding
description: Changes the Eye of Ender recipe to pad the run time of the game (and other crafting changes)
body:
A Data Pack that changes the crafting recipe for the Eye of Ender to make the game take longer to progress.

but its not just that, I also added crafting recipe for the trident, I love the trident, but frankly It's way to hard to obtain for how medicore it is. Throwing it is pretty useless without loyalty, and with the same durablity as an iron sword, it's gonna break pretty easliy unless you have unbreaking and mending. Anyway I'll stop ranting about the trident now.

I also changed the crafting recipe for the Ender chest.

All recpies are in the gallary.

Probably works for version below 1.21.5, I just haven't tested it.

You may put this in your modpacks as long as you credit me.
